steps.title: Interpret input and output
steps.content: In $K(v)=\frac{5}{2}v^2$, the input $v$ is speed in meters per second, and the output $K(v)$ is kinetic energy in joules.

steps.title: Apply the function notation
steps.content: The statement $K(18)=810$ means that when the speed is $18$ meters per second, the kinetic energy is $810$ joules.

steps.title: Match the interpretation
steps.content: This matches the statement that the object traveling at $18$ meters per second has a kinetic energy of $810$ joules. The answer is A.
